meaning: n.热情的,强烈的,热,热烈,热情
examples: Hendon exclaimed with a fervency which showed that he was touched.
Inward fervency wants to melt this icebound indifference but.
Fervency of one man in prayer can not supererogate for the coldness of another.
Never has a national museum reopened to such scenes of fervency.
